channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.description: Selecting the right cookware can make a significant difference in everyday cooking. The Curator team highlights the best cookware sets of 2026 suitable for various kitchens and budgets. From high-end ...

item.title: Joseph Paintsil aims to make lasting impact at LA Galaxy through performance and leadership
item.description: Joseph Paintsil, the Ghanaian winger currently playing for Major League Soccer (MLS) club LA Galaxy, has expressed his strong desire to become a legendary figure within the team. In a recent interview...

item.title: Illicit cigarette trade causes $22.3 billion revenue shortfall for Australian government
item.description: Since 2010, Australia's tobacco tax has surged by 300 per cent, but the resulting black market has dramatically reduced government revenue. Recent data reveals that only around half of all cigarettes ...

item.title: Cuba Faces Economic and Energy Crisis Amid US Blockade
item.description: Cuba is grappling with a severe economic and energy crisis following an oil blockade imposed by the Trump administration, aimed at pressuring the Cuban government towards regime change. The blockade c...

item.title: DJ Neptune Warns AI Technology Might Change Music Production Industry
item.description: Nigerian DJ and producer, DJ Neptune, don yan say Artificial Intelligence (AI) fit soon retire music producers. The matter come up when media personality N6 talk say AI dey quietly fit retire the whol...

item.title: Senate Aspirant Jailed for Fuel Supply to Boko Haram
item.description: A former senatorial candidate in Borno State, Babagana Habeeb, has been sentenced to 10 years in prison for secretly supplying fuel to Boko Haram terrorists. The Federal High Court in Abuja handed dow...

item.title: CISLAC Calls for Independent Investigation After Airstrike Hits Civilians in Borno–Yobe

item.title: X Limits Creator Payments to Combat Clickbait and News Aggregation
item.description: X, formerly known as Twitter, is implementing changes to its creator payment program, specifically targeting accounts that heavily rely on clickbait tactics and news aggregation. The platform's head, ...

item.title: Book finally returned to B.C. library after 23 years on loan
item.description: A public library in British Columbia recently received an overdue return more than two decades after the book was borrowed. The library reported that the item, checked out 23 years ago, would have acc...

item.description: The recent surge in electric vehicle (EV) sales is reshaping Australia's automotive market. Higher oil prices have encouraged motorists to consider EVs as a cost-effective and environmentally friendly...

item.title: Zambales Fishermen Express Concerns Over Proposed PH-China Oil and Gas Project in West Philippine Sea
item.description: Fishermen from Zambales have expressed cautious skepticism over the Philippine government's renewed plan to explore joint oil and gas ventures with China in the West Philippine Sea (WPS). Leonardo Cua...

item.title: The Role of Tannins in Plants, Soil and Everyday Life
item.description: Tannins are bitter, astringent chemicals found in many plant leaves that serve multiple roles in ecosystems and human use. They protect leaves from being eaten by insects and other animals, and some a...

item.title: Eskom Agrees Discounted Power Tariff with Smelters, Preserving Thousands of Jobs
item.description: South Africa’s ferrochrome industry has received a significant reprieve following Eskom’s agreement to provide discounted electricity tariffs to major operators, Samancor Chrome and the Glencore–Meraf...

item.title: Oil prices rise sharply following Trump’s proposed Strait of Hormuz blockade amid failed US-Iran negotiations
item.description: Benchmark oil prices climbed steeply in early Asian trading following a statement from US President Donald Trump proposing a full naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, one of the world’s most vital ...

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua Alleges Akorino Members Received Less Than Promised at State House Event
item.description: Democracy for Citizens Party (DCP) leader Rigathi Gachagua has raised concerns over Akorino members who attended a thanksgiving service at State House, claiming they were paid less than what was promi...

item.title: PM Modi to speak at Delhi conference regarding upcoming women's reservation bill
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is scheduled to address a special conference in Delhi, in anticipation of the introduction of the women's quota bill. The upcoming legislation aims to increase women's rep...
